name: verdant
description: VERDANT — low-poly third-person open-world survival game (Babylon.js) with a Node multiplayer server, by Heleo2 Studio

scripts.test: for t in test_server test_pvp test_coop test_leaderboard test_rpg test_logic test_saves test_keybinds test_gunsmith test_bullettime test_melee; do node $t.mjs || exit 1; done
